name: Escape Tsunami for Brainrots
description: Run fast and collect Brainrots! Run from the tsunamis when they appear! Survive and collect as many Brainrots as possible! Upgrade your Brainrots! Upgrade your base!
instructions: Run forward to get Brainrots Grab a Brainrot bring it back to your base in time and don rsquo t get caught by the tsunami
